name: Should We Let AI Auto-Handle Refunds? — Behavioral Simulation

nodes.name: Policy Proposal

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ proposal: $json.body?.proposal || 'Enable auto-refunds under $100', trust_score: $json.body?.current_state?.trust_score ?? 75, refund_rate: $json.body?.current_state?.refund_rate ?? 12, abuse_rate: $json.body?.current_state?.abuse_rate ?? 3, customer_satisfaction: $json.body?.current_state?.customer_satisfaction ?? 70, revenue_margin: $json.body?.current_state?.revenue_margin ?? 65, escalation_rate: $json.body?.current_state?.escalation_rate ?? 8, auto_resolve_rate: 60 }) }}

nodes.name: Prepare Simulation Input
nodes.notes: Normalizes input and sets auto_resolve_rate to 60% — this is the 'what if' scenario we're testing.

parameters.stateOverrides: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trust_score: $json.trust_score, refund_rate: $json.refund_rate, abuse_rate: $json.abuse_rate, customer_satisfaction: $json.customer_satisfaction, revenue_margin: $json.revenue_margin, escalation_rate: $json.escalation_rate, auto_resolve_rate: $json.auto_resolve_rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ trust_score: $json.trust_score, refund_rate: $json.refund_rate, abuse_rate: $json.abuse_rate, customer_satisfaction: $json.customer_satisfaction, revenue_margin: $json.revenue_margin, escalation_rate: $json.escalation_rate, auto_resolve_rate: $json.auto_resolve_rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ trust_score: $json.trust_score, refund_rate: $json.refund_rate, abuse_rate: $json.abuse_rate, customer_satisfaction: $json.customer_satisfaction, revenue_margin: $json.revenue_margin, escalation_rate: $json.escalation_rate, auto_resolve_rate: $json.auto_resolve_rate }) }}

nodes.name: Compare Profiles
nodes.notes: Compares all 3 simulation profiles side-by-side. Generates a comparison report with decision routing. No code needed.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'APPROVED', decision: $json.decision, recommendation: $json.recommendation, report: $json.report, profiles: $json.profiles }, null, 2) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'REVIEW', decision: $json.decision, recommendation: $json.recommendation, report: $json.report, profiles: $json.profiles }, null, 2) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'BLOCKED', decision: $json.decision, recommendation: $json.recommendation, report: $json.report, profiles: $json.profiles }, null, 2) }}
